name: Star Fox
description: Nintendo sci-fi rail-shooter and space-combat series starring Fox McCloud and the Star Fox team.

eras.title: Super FX Era
eras.description: The original SNES games establish Star Fox through polygonal 3D tech and Nintendo-Argonaut collaboration.

eras.title: Lylat Wars Era
eras.description: Star Fox 64 defines the series' main identity, followed by GameCube and DS experiments.

eras.title: Revival Era
eras.description: Remakes, the official release of Star Fox 2, and later reimaginings preserve the series as a Nintendo legacy franchise.
